creator: solidwarea@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Bjoern A. Zeeb from comment #3)

Sorry for my incredibly slow replies, I’ve been quite busy the last few days. I’ve got some free time today, I’ll boot FreeBSD 14.2 on an external HDD to try those commands out and see if I can get the source of the problem.

Do you think the problem could be in dhclient, or could it only be in wpa_supplicant?

I’ve been trying to figure out what changes FreeBSD release 14.2 has introduced in WiFi compatibility compared to 14.1 to see what the possible culprit could be here, but I don’t really know where to even begin looking.

Also yes, the mention of wifibox is irrelevant to this problem.
